tasks.task: Identify top competitors in the industry.
Compile a list of competitor ads across various platforms (social media, print, online).
Analyze the messaging, visuals, and calls to action in each ad.
Identify key trends and strategies used by competitors in their ads.
Compare competitor ads to our own marketing efforts to identify areas of improvement.
Create a report summarizing the analysis and recommendations for future marketing campaigns.

Implement marketing campaigns to reach small business owners through various channels.
